channel.title: Slashdot
channel.description: News for nerds, stuff that matters, & software

item.title: Slashdot
item.description:
If you feel like it, mail the url, and where ya came from to feedback@slashdot.org.
If you feel like it, mail the url, and where ya came from to feedback@slashdot.org.
The sooner you make your first 5000 mistakes, the sooner you will be able to correct them. -- Nicolaides...

If you feel like it, mail the url, and where ya came from to feedback@slashdot.org.

The sooner you make your first 5000 mistakes, the sooner you will be able to correct them. -- Nicolaides
